questions: how many hours should i sleep
answers: Tips: Consistent schedule, no screens before bed, dark cool room, no caffeine after 2 PM, 7-8 hours.
Sleep better by keeping a fixed sleep schedule, avoiding screens 1 hour before bed, and keeping your room cool and dark.
For faster sleep: try the 4-7-8 breathing technique, cut caffeine after 2 PM, and keep your room at a comfortable cool temperature.
Struggling to sleep? Put the phone down, dim the lights 30 minutes before bed, and stick to the same bedtime every night.
